lot_no: & River bank protective work along the left bank of Meghna river from km 125.617 to km 125.917 = 300 m in c/w "Protection work at the bank of Meghna river at Borokheri, Ludhuabazar and Kaderponditer hat areas in Ramgati and Kamal Nagar upazila under Lakshmipur District" Project in Upazila-Ramgati, Dist.-Lakshmipur under Lakshmipur O & M Division, BWDB, Lakshmipur (Package No: Lak/W-02/Lot-3/2021-22).
